channel.title: Web3 Security Paper Digest
channel.description: Curated papers on Web3, blockchain, and smart contract security from ArXiv and ACL

item.title: SymGPT: Auditing Smart Contracts via Combining Symbolic Execution with Large Language Models
item.description:
Summary

  • Introduces SymGPT, a tool that combines LLMs with symbolic execution to translate ERC rules into a domain-specific language, synthesize constraints, and detect rule violations in smart contracts.
  • Empirically analyzes 132 ERC rules across major standards to guide rule translation and modeling of potential violations.
  • Evaluates on 4,000 real-world contracts, finding 5,783 ERC rule violations (including 1,375 with concrete attack paths) and outperforming six automated tools and an expert auditing service.

Paper Type

  • Research

Additional Information

  • Authors: ['Shihao Xia', 'Mengting He', 'Shuai Shao', 'Tingting Yu', 'Yiying Zhang', 'Nobuko Yoshida', 'Linhai Song']
  • Tags: ['smart-contracts', 'symbolic-execution', 'LLMs', 'ERC-compliance', 'security-audit']
